arts.sum: Fans will be disappointed, we're disappointed, the hard part to accept is that it's not that we played poorly and lost, you take your medicine, but we're our own worst enemy in some of these games." Put that to one side and see the way we play, and you are frustrated you lost another game."

arts.ttl: Every word Ange Postecoglou said on why he took off Romero and Van de Ven plus Udogie's absence
arts.sum: Spurs produced shot after shot as the game wore on with Forest goalkeeper Matz Sels making a series of saves but it wasn't until the 87th minute when Richarlison finally took one of his chances with a header from Porro's cross, his fourth goal in his past five Premier League appearances. The visitors scored just five minutes into the game when Pedro Porro headed a Forest corner across the Spurs box and it fell for Elliot Anderson to hit a powerful shot that deflected off Rodrigo Bentancur and Guglielmo Vicario could not stop it from crossing the line.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Postecoglou insists players do not lack motivation as loss put down to lack of focus
arts.sum: Spurs are in danger of recording a worst-ever Premier League season

arts.ttl: Destiny Udogie Tottenham confusion vs Nottingham Forest as Mathys Tel and Wilson Odobert make case
arts.sum: Tottenham did have a couple of openings to get back into the game, with Mathys Tel thrashing at a free ball in the box and Richarlison heading wide from close range. He did waste a big chance just before the break when he headed wide from Odobert's cross at a time when Sarr was coming in at the back post.

arts.ttl: Tottenham player ratings vs Forest - Tel bright, Richarlison scores but Vicario mistakes - football.london
arts.sum: Pedro Porro headed a corner across the Spurs box and it fell for Elliot Anderson to hit a powerful shot that deflected off Rodrigo Bentancur and Guglielmo Vicario could not stop it from crossing the line. The Spurs boss made five changes with Djed Spence, Dejan Kulusevski, Richarlison, Pape Matar Sarr and Wilson Odobert all coming in for the the game at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: Spurs 1-2 Nottingham Forest: Nuno Espirito Santo admits relief after fast start earns visitors crucial Premier League win
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest head coach Nuno Espirito Santo acknowledges that his side were "fortunate" to earn a 2-1 victory over Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League on Monday night.

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Frustrated Postecoglou lauds 'outstanding' Spurs after 'disappointing' Forest defeat
arts.sum: The loss was indicative of Spurs’ struggles this season

arts.ttl: Tottenham: Postecoglou can take positives as Tel and Odobert impress in Forest loss
arts.sum: Another league loss was in stark contrast to Tottenham’s European form

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou left facing bleak reality as Nottingham Forest march past Spurs
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM 1-2 NOTTINGHAM FOREST: The noise around Ange Postecoglou's job is only likely to grow after another disappointing evening for the Australian and his side

arts.ttl: Fast-starting Nottingham Forest back up to third with win at Tottenham
arts.sum: First-half goals by Elliot Anderson and Chris Wood helped Nuno Espirito Santo win at his old club.
